\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4336 introduces Lemniscate Angular Velocity Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$\sum_{n=1}^{153600} \Omega[n] \cdot \hat{L}_{lemniscate}[n]$
\]
